filter_recent_runtime_hours_per_day.name: Filter recent runtime hours per day

user.title: Connect Beestat
user.description: Use Beestat as a secondary cloud/history surface. Existing Ecobee HomeKit entities remain the primary live/control source and are enriched automatically when they match Beestat thermostats and room sensors.

data_description.api_key: API key from Beestat. It is stored in the Home Assistant config entry and used only for Beestat API calls.
data_description.api_base: Optional Beestat API base URL. Keep the default unless Beestat changes its API host or you are testing a compatible endpoint.
data_description.point_lookback_days: Number of recent local days of point-history data to aggregate into Recorder statistics. Larger values import more history and take longer.
data_description.scan_interval_seconds: How often Home Assistant syncs Beestat and imports Recorder statistics. The minimum is 300 seconds.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Beestat Statistics
reconfigure.description: Update the Beestat API key or API URL used by this integration.

data_description.api_key: Enter a replacement Beestat API key, or leave blank to keep the current stored key.
data_description.api_base: Beestat API base URL. Keep the default unless you need to move the integration back from a custom endpoint.

reauth_confirm.title: [%key:common::config_flow::title::reauth%]
reauth_confirm.description: Beestat rejected the configured API key. Enter a valid Beestat API key to continue importing HVAC history.

data_description.api_key: Enter a current Beestat API key. Reauthentication requires a non-empty key.
data_description.api_base: Beestat API base URL to validate the new key against.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to Beestat with this API key.
error.wrong_account: This Beestat key appears to belong to a different account.
error.unknown: Unexpected error while validating the Beestat connection.

beestat_auth_failed.message: Beestat rejected the configured API key. Reauthenticate the integration to continue importing HVAC history.

beestat_request_failed.message: The Beestat request failed. Check the Beestat Statistics status sensor for details.

no_loaded_entry.message: No Beestat Statistics config entry is loaded.

invalid_rebuild_date_range.message: The rebuild start date must be on or before the end date.

unknown_thermostat_id.message: Beestat thermostat ID {thermostat_id} is not configured for this integration entry.

statistics_import_failed.message: Beestat statistics import failed. Check the Beestat Statistics status sensor and Home Assistant log for details.

invalid_override_entity_domains.title: Beestat override entities use the wrong domain
invalid_override_entity_domains.description: Beestat Statistics has advanced entity overrides assigned to the wrong Home Assistant domain: {entities}. Update or remove those overrides, then reload the integration.

missing_override_entities.title: Beestat override entities are missing
missing_override_entities.description: Beestat Statistics has advanced entity overrides that no longer point to existing Home Assistant entities: {entities}. Update or remove those overrides, then reload the integration.

get_configuration.name: Get Beestat configuration
get_configuration.description: Return the complete non-secret saved overrides and effective local Beestat mapping without changing integration state or contacting Beestat.

config_entry_id.name: Configuration entry
config_entry_id.description: Beestat Statistics configuration entry to inspect.

import_statistics.name: Import Beestat statistics
import_statistics.description: Sync Beestat runtime data, refresh native Beestat sensors, and import derived daily external statistics into Home Assistant Recorder.

point_lookback_days.name: Point lookback days
point_lookback_days.description: Number of recent local days of 5-minute sensor history to aggregate into daily room and air-quality statistics.

skip_sync.name: Skip Beestat sync
skip_sync.description: Skip Beestat runtime, thermostat, and sensor sync calls before importing.

rebuild_statistics.name: Rebuild Beestat statistics
rebuild_statistics.description: Rebuild derived Recorder statistics from the full Beestat summary baseline, optionally limited to one thermostat and local date range.

thermostat_id.name: Thermostat ID
thermostat_id.description: Optional configured Beestat thermostat ID to rebuild. Omit to rebuild all configured thermostats and sensors.

start_date.name: Start date
start_date.description: Optional first local date to write back to Recorder after rebuilding cumulative values from the full baseline.

end_date.name: End date
end_date.description: Optional last local date to write back to Recorder after rebuilding cumulative values from the full baseline.

skip_sync.name: Skip Beestat sync
skip_sync.description: Skip Beestat runtime, thermostat, and sensor sync calls before rebuilding.

init.title: Beestat Statistics options
init.description: Choose what to configure. Timing controls import cadence and mapping pins Beestat rows to existing HomeKit/Ecobee entities.

timing.title: Import timing
timing.description: Tune the recurring Beestat sync and how much recent point-history data each import reads.

data_description.point_lookback_days: Number of recent local days of point-history data to aggregate into Recorder statistics. Larger values import more history and take longer.
data_description.scan_interval_seconds: How often Home Assistant syncs Beestat and imports Recorder statistics. The minimum is 300 seconds.

thermostat_mapping.title: Map a Beestat thermostat
thermostat_mapping.description: Choose the Beestat thermostat whose local HomeKit/Ecobee entities or filter forecast settings need a manual override.

data_description.id: Select the Beestat thermostat whose HomeKit entities should be pinned.

thermostat_mapping_detail.title: Thermostat HomeKit mapping
thermostat_mapping_detail.description: Selected Beestat thermostat: {item}. Pin it to existing Home Assistant entities only when automatic matching is wrong or incomplete. Leave fields blank to keep automatic behavior.

data_description.climate_entity_id: HomeKit climate entity for this Ecobee thermostat.
data_description.temperature_entity_id: HomeKit temperature sensor for this thermostat.
data_description.occupancy_entity_id: HomeKit occupancy binary sensor for this thermostat, when available.
data_description.motion_entity_id: HomeKit motion binary sensor for this thermostat, when available.
data_description.filter_changed_entity_id: Optional existing input_datetime helper. The Home Assistant Filter changed date entity is preferred for new setups.
data_description.filter_lifetime_runtime_hours: Runtime-hours replacement threshold used to forecast the filter due date.
data_description.filter_max_age_days: Calendar-age replacement threshold in days, measured from the effective filter changed date.
data_description.filter_notice_days: Days before the calculated due date that should be treated as the notice window.

sensor_mapping.title: Map a Beestat room sensor
sensor_mapping.description: Choose the Beestat room sensor whose local HomeKit/Ecobee entities or statistic import toggles need a manual override.

data_description.id: Select the Beestat room sensor whose HomeKit entities should be pinned.

sensor_mapping_detail.title: Room sensor HomeKit mapping
sensor_mapping_detail.description: Selected Beestat room sensor: {item}. Pin it to existing Home Assistant entities and choose which daily Recorder statistics to import. Leave entity fields blank to keep automatic behavior.

data_description.thermostat_id: Optional Beestat thermostat ID when Beestat does not report the owning thermostat.
data_description.temperature_entity_id: HomeKit temperature sensor for this Ecobee room sensor.
data_description.occupancy_entity_id: HomeKit occupancy binary sensor for this room sensor, when available.
data_description.motion_entity_id: HomeKit motion binary sensor for this room sensor, when available.
data_description.include_temperature: Import daily Recorder temperature statistics for this sensor.
data_description.include_air_quality: Import daily Recorder air-quality statistics when Beestat exposes them.
data_description.include_co2: Import daily Recorder CO2 statistics when Beestat exposes them.
data_description.include_voc: Import daily Recorder TVOC statistics when Beestat exposes them.

error.no_discovered_items: No Beestat thermostats or room sensors have been discovered yet. Refresh runtime data, then try again.
